description: LiftTrack is a mobile app for Garmin users to build, sync, and track strength-training workouts. It provides workout planning, exercise tracking, and Garmin watch integration for guided lifting sessions.
summary: LiftTrack exposes an OAuth-authenticated MCP server at https://mcp.lifttrackapp.com/ for AI assistants and MCP clients; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or first-party CLI surfaced in public docs.
